{{Infobox character
| name = Javik Leed
| aliases = Javik
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|pilots a hover-chair}}{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|, uses a heavy two-handed rifle}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Yellow Knight]], [[Titan Knight]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Titan Force]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Aether Technician]]}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Nyron Seven]]}}
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Engineer (novel)|The Engineer]]
}}

''See also: [[Javik Leed Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Javik Leed, also known as the [[Yellow Knight]], is a dark-skinned human and a former member of the [[Titan Force]]. He served as an [[Aether Technician]], possessing a specific affinity for performing repairs. During his service, he operated the [[Yellow Titan]], which he could utilize to summon heavy weaponry from [[Subspace]], such as a two-handed cannon or massive guns capable of delivering high-impact ballistic barrages. His involvement in a conflict against [[Neth’terith]] resulted in the destruction of his [[Divine Titan]], leaving him requiring extensive medical treatment and years of recovery to return to full health. In his retirement, Javik lived with his family on [[Nyron Seven]]. While recovering, he utilized a hover-chair for mobility and worked with a therapist to manage his temper. Despite not being a [[Combat Artist]], he is proficient with firearms, such as automatic mag-rifles. He has a history of working alongside Raion and is characterized by his commitment to protecting people and his ability to maintain composure in team settings.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Javik is alive and lives with his family on [[Nyron Seven]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c30">''The Captain'', chapter 30</ref>}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Javik Leed]] is a former [[Yellow Knight]] of the [[Titan Force]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c44">''The Engineer'', chapter 44</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Javik is a former [[Titan Knight]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c44" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Javik pilots a hover-chair.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c44" />}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Javik Leed is a [[Titan Knight]] who held the title of the [[Yellow Knight]] and was associated with the [[Yellow Titan]]. Having survived the destruction of his [[Divine Titan]], he serves as a team member and functions as their resident [[Aether Technician]]. Although he is not a [[Combat Artist]], Javik utilizes a heavy two-handed rifle in his duties.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Javik Leed]] is the [[Yellow Knight]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c2">''The Knight'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Javik is a Knight who survived the destruction of his [[Divine Titan]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c7">''The Knight'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Javik Leed]] is the [[Yellow Knight]] and the team's resident [[Aether Technician]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c12">''The Knight'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Javik is not a [[Combat Artist]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Javik uses a heavy two-handed rifle.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Javik is a character associated with the [[Yellow Titan]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c20">''The Knight'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Javik was a [[Titan Knight]] who held the title of [[Yellow Knight]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c31">''The Knight'', chapter 31</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“Javik’s still alive,” Raion said, with a distant echo of his normal optimism. “He retired to live with his family on Nyron Seven.”<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c30" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Titan Force]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
